channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: David Schwimmer Slams Kanye West’s Apology, Urges Remaining Wireless Festival Sponsors to Exit
item.description: 🔥 Drama alert! David Schwimmer takes on Kanye West's apology at Wireless Festival. Who's ready for the next showdown? 🎶 #MusicNews

item.title: The Strokes Share New Song “Going Shopping” Via Cassette Mailed To Fans
item.description: Unwrapping new tunes like a rad '80s throwback! 🛍️🎶 Groove along with @thestrokes' latest cassette surprise! #GoingShopping #MusicNews

item.title: Rising Artists Raise the Roof at Tipify x SPIN’s “Road to Austin” Showcase
item.description: 🔥 Grooving through the night with hot newcomers at the Tipify x SPIN “Road to Austin” Showcase! 🎶 #RisingStars #MusicScene

item.title: Rocketship add East Coast dates to 2026 tour, including first NYC show in 12 years
item.description: 🚀 East Coast takeover! Rocketship returns to NYC after 12 years! Who's ready to blast off with them? 🌟 #RocketshipTour2026

item.title: Ultra Europe Is the Ultimate Summer Dance Festival
item.description: Dance the summer nights away at Ultra Europe 🌟🎶 Who's joining for the ultimate festival vibes? 💃 #UltraEurope #SummerVibes
